name: prompt-eng-toolkit
description: Defense-first workflow for designing and compressing production single-turn LLM system prompts.

plugins.name: prompt-eng-toolkit
plugins.description: Two skills (prompt-create, prompt-optimize) for engineering production single-turn LLM system prompts. Multi-provider (Gemini 3 / Claude 4.5+ / GPT-5) doc consensus, iterative API testing with theory-only fallback, before/after token comparison, built-in injection-defense fixtures.
